vibe: Playful, friendly, safe, and approachable. Clean pastel aesthetics with soft rounded corners and large, highly legible typography.

fonts.heading: Nunito
fonts.instructions: Import these from Google Fonts in index.html: <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700;800;900&family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 to provide breathing room. Avoid cramped interfaces.
spacing_and_layout.buttons: Large tap targets required for children. Minimum padding py-4 px-8. Use rounded-full.
spacing_and_layout.chat_interface: Max-width of 3xl. Bubbles should have large padding (p-4 to p-6) and exaggerated radius (rounded-[2rem] or rounded-3xl). Space out bubbles with gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_layout: Sidebar navigation + main content area. Use grid with gap-6 or gap-8. Cards should have p-6 or p-8 internal padding.

surfaces_and_borders.cards: rounded-3xl shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border-2 border-slate-100/50 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all duration-300
surfaces_and_borders.inputs: rounded-full border-2 border-slate-200 bg-white px-6 py-4 text-xl focus:border-sky-400 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-sky-100 outline-none transition-all
surfaces_and_borders.buttons: rounded-full shadow-[0_4px_0_0_rgba(14,165,233,0.3)] hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:shadow-[0_2px_0_0_rgba(14,165,233,0.3)] active:translate-y-[4px] active:shadow-none transition-all duration-150 font-bold

animation_and_motion.chat_entrance: Staggered fade-in-up for chat bubbles (use framer-motion with spring physics, stiffness: 200, damping: 20).
animation_and_motion.micro_interactions: Heart or star particle bursts on positive feedback or task completion (optional, use framer-motion).

component_instructions.icons: Use lucide-react. Set strokeWidth to 2.5 or 3 for a chunkier, more playful look. Size them large (w-8 h-8 or w-10 h-10 for kids UI).
component_instructions.dashboard_cards: Use Shadcn Card component but override the border-radius to rounded-3xl and use the custom shadow defined in surfaces.
component_instructions.alerts: For flagged messages, use Shadcn Alert but with soft rounded-2xl borders and the status colors defined above (e.g., rose-100 bg, rose-300 border).
component_instructions.avatar: Avatars should be large (w-16 h-16 minimum in chat, larger on profile pages), rounded-full, with a 4px border of white and a subtle shadow.

images.description: The AI bot's profile picture in the chat interface.
Placeholder avatar for the child user.
Image for the parental dashboard header or welcome card.

media.backgrounds: Use soft CSS radial gradients in the background to emulate a sky or gentle landscape. Example: 'bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_top,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-sky-100 via-white to-slate-50'.

testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
